description: llama.cpp head-to-head on identical hardware and the same pinned Qwen3-4B-Base HF revision. llama.cpp converted independently from the same safetensors; measured with llama-bench on an otherwise idle machine. Note: llama-bench reports mean and stddev over runs, whereas Kipp results report median and MAD. Q4_0 is llama.cpp's scale-only 4-bit gs32 format; Kipp's affine4_gs32 is scale+bias 4-bit gs32 - closest available match, not identical. Reps use p=2048/n=256 so each measurement is long enough to hold sustained GPU clocks; Kipp prefill at the matched 2048-token prompt is in 4b-*-prefill2k.json.
